priority_fixes: Keep the revised encounter block terse and machine-parseable.
Preserve option ids and reaction ids from the target encounter when possible.
Make reactions concrete and scene-specific instead of generic pressure verbs.
Avoid introducing new lore not implied by the local packet.

plan: Identify the smallest local improvement that clarifies stakes or consequences.
Prefer continuity with the target encounter and one-hop neighbors.
encounter_build: Emit only a valid ENC block with ORX lines.
Favor concrete social leverage, suspicion, and trust shifts over generic nudges.
